message:
refactor(circuit_breaker): embed failure count in Closed state for atomic consistency

Restructure State::Closed to carry a failures counter directly in the enum
variant, eliminating the separate AtomicU32 failure_count field. This ensures
state transitions and failure counts are always consistent via the single
atomic state_bits word — no torn reads between separate atomics.

- State::Closed now carries { failures: u32 }
- Remove standalone failure_count, success_count, probes_active atomics
- Encode/decode failures in to_bits/from_bits (bits[8..40])
- Update all state transitions to maintain embedded counter
- Add comprehensive tests for reset-on-open and half-open probe semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
